artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2023-06-20
artifacts.excerpt:
I feel like there's been a lot of "jobs are bad and you should quit" energy on the timeline lately

so here are some reasons jobs are good and what I miss about having one

1) working with smart, engaged people on shared projects, bouncing ideas around and helping each other
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: good, thing, yeah, way.

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2022-07-13
artifacts.excerpt:
hey

you’re probably looking at your phone right now. that’s cool

you might feel quite stressed though

if you look at your phone while widening your peripheral vision and noticing the sounds in your environment, you’ll probably feel less stressed 

have a good day
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: good, thing, yeah, way.

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2023-04-28
artifacts.excerpt:
After years of trying different task management systems I’m disgusted to report that writing down all my tasks on an A3 pad on my desk and then starting a new sheet when it gets full is the best way

my life is insufficiently complex for a complex system, big paper good
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: good, thing, yeah, way.

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2021-09-16
artifacts.excerpt:
For the last six months I’ve gone for a 30 - 45 minute walk every morning as close to waking as possible. I’ve missed maybe three days when it was raining heavily.

It’s become one of my favourite habits - seems to have a strong link with how good I feel.

planets.name: Want
planets.summary: Archive cluster around want: 1390 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Want receipt from 2023-11-29
artifacts.excerpt:
thinking back to a time I was struggling and burnt out at work, I suggested to my manager that specific encouragement when I did difficult things well would be helpful

and the response was "awwwww you want me to tell you that you're pretty"

the moment I knew I had to leave
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: want, really, here, course.

artifacts.title: Want receipt from 2022-01-12
artifacts.excerpt:
I have a talking point that I want to bang on about more in different ways

that is "you can only respond to what you notice"

not being able to notice something (if it lies outside your awareness) renders you choiceless

expanding your capacity to notice things gives you agency
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: want, really, here, course.

artifacts.title: Want receipt from 2021-09-29
artifacts.excerpt: Every time you come across strategies to skip the small talk and get straight to the action I want you to replace ‘small talk’ with ‘foreplay’ and see how much sense that makes.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: want, really, here, course.

artifacts.title: Want receipt from 2021-01-10
artifacts.excerpt:
I want to write a little bit about the importance of earnestness.

As I look back on my childhood (I'm 33 now) I see that I was earnest a lot of the time.

It seemed obvious that I would have deep interests and be fully engaged in them for their own sake.

But...
